violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean nacho cheese dispenser.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop is being stored directly under the paper towels. This unit needs to be moved.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving unit above three compartment sink could use touch up paint/seal. Shelf is worn and raw wood material is exposed. Other shelving units in the storage room also need to be painted/sealed.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil is not approved for use by food service code. Bucket for "Ice Only" is not approved for food use.
Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Ice machine in the backroom could use cleaning. Lift up the lid and clean.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Far left nozzle on soda fountain has a bit of build up, needs cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Ceiling is missing many tiles in the backroom. Replace with units that are smooth and easily cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities were not maintained in good repair. Floor tile in the backroom is cracked, busted, and missing in many places. These will need to be replaced.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
